overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from an elevated plaza down to a crowded street with digital billboards, then into a covered walkway with passing vehicles. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit architecture, wet reflective surfaces, and futuristic urban density.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza between glass towers

events.description: descending from elevated walkway to lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway, turning right and approaching the descent to street level

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with illuminated windows rising above the plaza
simple concrete seating along the walkway edge
rain-slicked elevated pedestrian path with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated walkway between towering glass buildings at night. The camera moves forward while turning right, passing concrete benches and trash cans. The wet surface reflects the ambient city lights as the walker approaches the edge of the elevated plaza, preparing to descend to the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza under overpass with digital advertising

events.description: descends from elevated walkway into lower plaza with large digital billboards
crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians carrying umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through crowded plaza passing digital billboards and pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking toward camera
pedestrian in white shirt walking away from camera toward billboards

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying fashion brand with reclining figure
digital screen with text about second amendment rights
neon pink text advertisement for 'WET DREAM' product
elevated roadway structure with orange accent lighting spanning above the plaza
tropical tree planted in the urban plaza space

segments.scene_description: Having descended to street level, the scene opens into a bustling commercial plaza beneath an orange-trimmed overpass. Large digital billboards for 'JINGUJI' and other brands illuminate the left side while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the wet tiled ground. The crowd density increases significantly as the camera moves through the space, passing under the shelter of the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway adjacent to vehicle road

events.description: enters covered walkway with road traffic visible on the right side
passing bright vertical illuminated panels casting greenish light

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway with road traffic visible to the right, passing illuminated building entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the covered road
pedestrian with illuminated blue umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: solid overhead structure providing shelter from rain, creating tunnel-like effect
illuminated entrance sign reading 'NIGHT CITY' on building facade
tall bright rectangular light fixture emitting white-green light
covered roadway with moving traffic separated by concrete barrier
large structural column supporting the overhead walkway and road

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a long covered walkway resembling an urban tunnel, with a vehicle road running parallel on the right. The 'NIGHT CITY' sign marks a building entrance on the left as the camera passes bright vertical light panels. Futuristic cars drive by on the right while sparse pedestrians walk ahead, and the enclosed space creates a more intimate, corridor-like atmosphere compared to the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, rain-slicked elevated plaza down into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a futuristic city. It begins on a high walkway between towering glass buildings, moving past concrete benches and reflective wet surfaces before descending toward the lower levels. As the camera reaches street level, the environment opens into a bustling commercial plaza beneath an orange-trimmed overpass, where the lighting shifts to the glow of massive digital billboards and a growing crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas. The scene then transitions from the open plaza into a long, enclosed urban tunnel, passing a Night City sign and bright vertical light panels. Finally, the perspective narrows into this corridor-like walkway as futuristic cars stream by on a parallel road, shifting the atmosphere from expansive urban density to an intimate, sheltered passage.
